Class Hand

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
public class Hand extends Object
Represents a hand of cards in the game of Whist.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Hand(ArrayList<Card> cards)
    A constructor for a Hand of a player.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<String>
    getAllowedHandCards(Suit currentSuit)
    A method for finding all the allowed hand cards for a given suit.

    getHandCards()
    A simple getter finding the string values of all the cards in this hand.
    int
    getHandSize()
    A simple getter for the size of this hand.
    String
    getOuterCard(Suit suit, boolean highest)
    A helper method for finding the highest or lowest value card in this hand for a given suit.
    boolean
    hasSuit(Suit suit)
    A simple checker to see if this hand has a card of a given suit.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    A simple getter giving whether this hand is empty or not.
    boolean
    isValidCardForPlaying(String card, Suit currentSuit)
    A simple checker to see if a certain played card is valid for playing from this hand.
    Card
    playCard(String card)
    A method that plays a card from this hand.

  • Constructor Details

    • Hand

      public Hand(ArrayList<Card> cards) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A constructor for a Hand of a player.
      Parameters:
      cards - The starting cards of this player.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - The given cards are of invalid length.

  • Method Details

    • playCard

      public Card playCard(String card) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A method that plays a card from this hand.
      Parameters:
      card - The string card to be played.
      Returns:
      The corresponding card in the hand.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - The given card isn't found in this hand.

    • isValidCardForPlaying

      public boolean isValidCardForPlaying(String card, Suit currentSuit)
      A simple checker to see if a certain played card is valid for playing from this hand.

    • getHandCards

      public ArrayList<String> getHandCards()
      A simple getter finding the string values of all the cards in this hand.

    • getOuterCard

      public String getOuterCard(Suit suit, boolean highest)
      A helper method for finding the highest or lowest value card in this hand for a given suit. If the given suit isn't found in this hand or is null the returned card is the overall highest or lowest card in the entire hand.
      Parameters:
      suit - The suit of the card.
      Returns:
      An empty string if there are no cards in this hand, A string of the highest or lowest value card if the suit is present.

    • getAllowedHandCards

      public ArrayList<String> getAllowedHandCards(Suit currentSuit)
      A method for finding all the allowed hand cards for a given suit.
      Parameters:
      currentSuit - The suit that is currently on the table.
      Returns:
      The list of all allowed cards.

    • hasSuit

      public boolean hasSuit(Suit suit)
      A simple checker to see if this hand has a card of a given suit.

    • getHandSize

      public int getHandSize()
      A simple getter for the size of this hand.

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      A simple getter giving whether this hand is empty or not.
